message:
test(ffs-block): remove hard-fail latency threshold, keep advisory-only warns

Latency-based regression checks are inherently noisy across heterogeneous
CI hardware. Remove FAIL_THRESHOLD_PERCENT entirely so p99 latency checks
only warn, never fail the test suite. Hit-rate checks remain strict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
